description: Before a train is loaded, each empty rail car must be inspected for damage or debris.

nodes.task_description: A train arrives, and a work order is generated to inspect all its cars.

expected_outcome.expected: A new inspection work order is created in the system.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a team of inspectors to walk the length of the train.

expected_outcome.expected: The inspection team is assigned the job.

nodes.task_description: The inspectors check each car and report its status (OK, Damaged, Dirty). Any cars that fail inspection are flagged and not loaded.

expected_outcome.expected: The inspectors log their findings, flagging one car as 'Damaged'. The system prevents any container from being planned onto that car.
